payload.author: Bri
payload.body: Verified already implemented: the workspace table carries key/name/description/overview (db.js:122-131), and migrate() (db.js:447-580) performs exactly the described idempotent v1->v2 startup migration — detects the legacy projects table, backfills the workspace singleton from the first projects row, rebuilds tickets without project_id, and drops the projects table, guarded by schema_version so it runs once. Covered by the green suite (236/236). Marking done.
